rationale.R1.2: The rewrite identifies and corrects the misapplication of doubly-robust estimation and clarifies the optimality claim.
rationale.RX.1: The summary acknowledges uncertainty in some claims but doesn't explicitly quantify it for each recommendation.

rationale.RX.4: The rewrite avoids introducing new errors or harmful content.
